layout_note: Standard House Form A grid. Block B value columns A-M (A=None, B=$1-$1,000, C=$1,001-$15,000, D=$15,001-$50,000, E=$50,001-$100,000, F=$100,001-$250,000, G=$250,001-$500,000, H=$500,001-$1,000,000, I=$1,000,001-$5,000,000, J=$5,000,001-$25,000,000, K=$25,000,001-$50,000,000, L=Over $50,000,000, M=Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000). Block D amount columns I-XII (I=None, II=$1-$200, III=$201-$1,000, IV=$1,001-$2,500, V=$2,501-$5,000, VI=$5,001-$15,000, VII=$15,001-$50,000, VIII=$50,001-$100,000, IX=$100,001-$1,000,000, X=$1,000,001-$5,000,000, XI=Over $5,000,000, XII=Spouse/DC Asset with income over $1,000,000). Portfolio structure: ARECO LP (Commercial Property) with sub-vehicles Ritu Ahuja 1995 Trust and Grandchildren Trust holding the Cincinnati/Harahan/Walton Hills properties; then MURA Holdings LLC / Ritu Ahuja 1994 Trust; then ASK Partners / Grandchildren Trust. Cincinnati and Harahan carry value None (sold during year, Block E = S) with RENT income; Walton Hills held. Block D exact column is scan-limited; flagged.

uncertainties.note: Block D exact column hard to resolve at scan resolution; could be V ($2,501-$5,000)
X mark near IX/X boundary; could be X ($1,000,001-$5,000,000)
Block D column uncertain; could be VI ($5,001-$15,000)
SP vs DC portions of same property show very different amounts; positional reading, medium confidence
X in last Block B column M (Block C NONE shading begins immediately right); SP Walton Hills, MAI Capital, Transtar all in M
